LongOK.Command: echo "long ok start"; date; sleep 120; echo "long ok end"; date; exit 0

DeterministicFail.Command: echo "this job fails"; date; echo "ERROR: simulated failure" 1>&2; exit 2

IntermittentFail.Command: echo "intermittent start"; date; r=$((RANDOM % 4)); echo "roll=$r"; if [ "$r" -eq 0 ]; then echo "ERROR: intermittent failure" 1>&2; exit 1; fi; echo "ok"; exit 0

NoisyOutput.Command: echo "noisy start"; date; i=0; while [ $i -lt 200 ]; do echo "INFO line $i"; i=$((i+1)); done; echo "noisy end"; date; exit 0
